statusLine.command: input=$(cat); user=$(whoami); host=$(hostname -s); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); short_dir=$(echo "$cwd" | sed "s|^$HOME|~|"); if [ "$cwd" = "$HOME" ]; then short_dir="~"; fi; git_info=""; if [ -d "$cwd/.git" ] || git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$branch" ]; then git_info=" (git:$branch)"; fi; fi; context_info=""; if [ -n "$remaining" ]; then context_info=" | ctx:${remaining}%"; fi; printf "\033[36m%s@%s\033[0m:\033[34m%s\033[0m\033[32m%s\033[0m | \033[35m%s\033[0m%s" "$user" "$host" "$short_dir" "$git_info" "$model" "$context_info"
